  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    archivers/rpm4       Makefile 
  Added files:

  Log:

  when importing the rpm4 module in Python.

  Submitted by:   Sean Mitchell <smitchell@hcn-inc.com>
  Feature safe:   yes
